tools.name: -health-check
tools.description: Internal health check tool. Verifies WebSocket connectivity to backend.

tools.name: search-messages
tools.description: Search for text in messages across all past conversations. Returns matches grouped by channel with context snippets.

query.description: Text to search for (case-insensitive, minimum 2 characters)

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 50, max: 100)

tools.name: list-channels
tools.description: List past conversations. Returns channel names, agents, and last message preview.

limit.description: Maximum number of channels to return (default: 20)

tools.name: get-channel-messages
tools.description: Get messages from a specific past conversation. Supports pagination.

channelId.description: The ID of the channel to get messages from

before.description: Message ID for pagination - get messages before this one

textOnly.description: Only return text messages, excluding tool executions (default: true)

tools.name: get-channel-summary
tools.description: Get a quick summary of a conversation without all messages. Useful to understand what a conversation was about.

channelId.description: The ID of the channel to summarize

tools.name: create-conversation
tools.description: Create a new conversation with a specific agent. Returns the new channel ID that can be used to send messages.

agentId.description: The ID of the agent to start a conversation with

tools.name: send-message
tools.description: Send a message to an existing conversation. The agent will process and respond to the message.

channelId.description: The ID of the channel to send the message to

tools.name: rename-channel
tools.description: Rename a conversation. Changes the title/name of a channel.

channelId.description: The ID of the channel to rename

name.description: The new name/title for the conversation
